Pricing

Simple, honest pricing.

Free for the people who need help. Businesses pay only for results.

🎉

Always free for users.

No account required. No credit card. No hidden fees.
Describe your issue and get matched with a vetted pro — completely free, every time.

  • ✓AI triage of your issue
  • ✓Instant matching with local pros
  • ✓Real reviews and ratings
  • ✓Direct contact with providers
  • ✓No booking fees or commissions
Find a Pro Now — Free →

ScheduleMe is funded by service businesses, not by users. This is our promise.

FAQ

Pricing questions

Are there setup fees?
None. Starter plan is completely free to join. You only pay $8 per lead received. Pro and Agency have flat monthly fees with no per-lead charge.
What counts as a "lead"?
A lead is a customer request that matches your service category and location and is delivered to your dashboard. Requests that don't match your profile are never counted.
Can I switch plans later?
Yes — upgrade, downgrade, or cancel anytime from your dashboard. Changes take effect at the start of your next billing cycle.
What is the bad-lead credit guarantee?
On Pro and Agency, if a lead is invalid (wrong category, fake contact info, or outside your service area), report it within 48 hours and we'll credit your account — no questions asked.
Is there a contract?
No contracts. Monthly billing, cancel anytime. Annual billing available at 20% discount (contact us).
Why is it free for users?
ScheduleMe is funded by the businesses on the platform. Consumers should never have to pay to find help — that's our core belief.

Still have questions?

Our team is happy to walk you through the right plan for your business.

Talk to usStart for free
